addons.description: AdvancedSkeleton rigging toolset for Maya. Contributes its maya-scripts folder to the Maya Launcher env bridge — does not launch Maya itself.
Checks whether the Maya version this machine has linked (via Software Linker) matches what the repo requires.
ngSkinTools2 for Maya. Contributes its maya-scripts folder plus a per-Maya-version maya-plug-ins/ folder to the Maya Launcher env bridge — does not launch Maya itself.
UkoreHub's own Maya scripts and plug-ins (Renamer, RigBox, WeightPuller, and friends). Contributes maya-scripts and maya-plug-ins to the Maya Launcher env bridge — does not launch Maya itself.
mGear rigging framework for Maya. Contributes its maya-modules and mgear-custom-component folders to the Maya Launcher env bridge — does not launch Maya itself.
